name: screen-guardian
description: Ultra-light compatibility-first AI screen access with fallback adapters.

interface.shortDescription: 不强迫升级的超轻量 AI 屏幕访问。
interface.longDescription: Screen Guardian is freedom-preserving capability infrastructure for personal AI. This ultra-light release expands local visual access with configurable cache paths, workflow metadata, window capture, bounded change-triggered capture, and local image analysis/preprocessing while keeping compatibility fallbacks light.
defaultPrompt: Watch a window briefly for visual changes.
